subject: Application for Forward-Deployed Data Scientist II — Braze, Paris
paragraphs: Before moving into AI, I spent 8 years managing a team at Fnac. I left that career deliberately to retrain in machine learning and data science. That background gives me something most technical profiles don't have: I'm used to working directly with people, understanding what they actually need rather than what they say they need, and explaining technical choices in plain terms. A forward-deployed role where the job is as much about client success as model performance feels like a natural fit.

For the past 3 years I've been an AI/ML Engineer at Missia, a computer vision startup. I built end-to-end ML pipelines: fine-tuning Transformers and CV models on AWS SageMaker Spot, FastAPI inference services, embedding and RAG pipelines, real-time edge inference on Jetson Orin NX. I also set up the MLOps stack: MLflow, Docker multi-arch, CI/CD with GitHub Actions. I write modular, tested, documented code because I've had to maintain it in production.

Earlier, I interned at GoodBarber where I delivered a semantic search engine integrated into a Django production backend in 3 months, working directly with the product team to scope and ship it. I also built career-ops-fr, a personal tool for job search automation with scraping, LLM scoring, and a FastAPI dashboard — a project I run and maintain daily. I'm available from October 2026.
I'd be happy to discuss further if my profile is a good fit.
